summary: Jordan R. Paquinol and Leira Arnie F. Angel matched on Bumble in 2021 and became a couple in 2022. Even after time apart, they found their way back to each other. Vietnam brought adventure and long distance tested their bond — until June 2024, when Jordan proposed in Thailand and Leira said yes. Side by side again in Vietnam, they’ve built a life together and can’t wait to say “I do” with you on June 26, 2026.
paragraphs: Jordan R. Paquinol and Leira Arnie F. Angel first met on Bumble in 2021. What began as a simple match soon turned into meaningful conversations, laughter, and a growing connection. By 2022, they officially became a couple.

Like many love stories, theirs had a few twists along the way. After a short breakup for a few months, they eventually found their way back to each other, realizing that their story was far from over.

In 2023, Leira received a job offer in Vietnam — an exciting new chapter in her life. Jordan flew with her to Vietnam to support her journey (and together, they successfully made it past immigration!). What was meant to be a short 7-day visit quickly turned into a 15-day stay, as they cherished every moment together before starting a long-distance relationship.

From August 2023 to June 2024, they navigated love across the miles through constant communication, patience, and faith. Long distance wasn't easy, but their love grew stronger as they chose each other every day despite the distance.

In June 2024, Jordan planned a special trip to Thailand and secretly invited Leira's best friend to join them. On June 21, during the trip, he asked the most important question — and Leira happily said yes. Their first year together in Vietnam came with its own challenges, but through it all, they held on to each other and made it through by God's grace.

Soon after, their story brought them back together in Vietnam. From 2024 until June 2026, Jordan R. Paquinol and Leira Arnie F. Angel continued their journey side by side, working and building their lives together while preparing for the beautiful future ahead.
Through distance, faith, and countless memories, their love has only grown stronger — leading them to this joyful moment as they begin the next chapter of their lives together.
verse: "He has made everything beautiful in its time." — Ecclesiastes 3:11
closing: We can't wait to celebrate with you as we say "I do" on June 26, 2026.
